title: ThinkNode M7: border router with PoE + WiFi backhaul
description: Enable M7 as border router. Options: (1) PoE for power only, WiFi for backhaul, (2) If Ethernet PHY present, native Ethernet backhaul. Implement RPL DODAG root, prefix delegation. Clean single-cable indoor deployment.
close_reason: Enabled M7 as BR with PoE+WiFi, RPL root (LORA_LICHEN_GATEWAY_RPL_ROOT=y), prefix delegation via RA in shared WiFi gateway confs (tnok). All 5 beads fixed, 3 codereview passes, west tdeck/m7 PASS. Scoped to conf/gateway/net, existing patterns only. Closed all.
